title: Build error in task-runner due to missing exports from n8n-core
symptom: When attempting to build the task-runner, the process fails with errors indicating that certain members are not exported from 'n8n-core'. This prevents the build from completing successfully.
not_this_if: Building an older version of n8n
root_cause: The error occurs because the task-runner module is trying to import members from 'n8n-core' that have either been removed or renamed in the newer version of n8n. This can happen when dependencies are not properly updated or when the build process does not account for changes in the core library.
fix_steps: Run 'pnpm reset' to clear the cache and rebuild all dependencies
Try building 'n8n-core' first using 'pnpm build --filter n8n-core'
Then attempt to build the task-runner again using 'pnpm run build --filter @n8n/task-runner'
agent_instruction: Execute 'pnpm reset' followed by building 'n8n-core' and then the task-runner.
